headline: Healthpeak Properties and Janus Living Announce Pricing of Upsized $840 Million Janus Living Initial Public Offering
summary: DENVER, March 19, 2026--Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC) ("Healthpeak") and Janus Living, Inc. ("Janus Living") announced the pricing of Janus Living’s upsized initial public offering ("IPO") of 42,000,000 shares of Janus Living Class A-1 common stock at a price to the public of $20.00 per share. In addition, Janus Living has granted the underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 6,300,000 shares of its Class A-1 common stock at the initial public offering price, less th

headline: 2 Reliable And Undervalued Dividends For Passive Income
summary: Both Verizon and Healthpeak Properties maintain BBB+ credit ratings, strong balance sheets, and are trading below historical valuation multiples. Read what investors need to know.
